name: TorchMetrics

performance.notes: GPU-native metric computation; distributed-aware; efficient state accumulation

agent_readiness.notes: Collection of PyTorch metrics for machine learning. 100+ metrics: accuracy, F1, AUC, BLEU, ROUGE, perplexity, FID, LPIPS, IoU, mAP, and many more. GPU-native computation. Distributed training support. Stateful (accumulate over batches). Works standalone or with PyTorch Lightning. Replaces manual metric implementation — just torchmetrics.Accuracy(task='multiclass', num_classes=10)(preds, target). Covers classification, regression, text, image, audio metrics.

gotchas: Some metrics have complex configuration (multiclass vs multilabel)
Dependencies: some metrics require additional packages (e.g., FID requires inception model)
best_when: PyTorch training loops needing standard ML metrics
Distributed training with automatic metric aggregation
Any ML evaluation needing BLEU, ROUGE, FID, mAP, etc.
avoid_when: Very simple accuracy computation (torch.mean(preds == labels) sufficient)
summary: TorchMetrics provides 100+ GPU-native ML metrics for PyTorch: accuracy, F1, AUC, BLEU, ROUGE, FID, mAP, IoU, and more. Stateful accumulation over batches. Distributed training support. Works standalone or with PyTorch Lightning. The go-to library for replacing manual metric code in PyTorch training loops. Comprehensive coverage of classification, regression, text, and image metrics.
